docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KAUF, GARY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT FITZSIMONS, RYAN $5,806.42 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,881.42, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED JAN-30-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAUF, GARY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT RYAN FITZSIMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT GARY KAUG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITZSIMONS, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAUF, GARY $4,930.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY KAUF, GARY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FITZSIMONS, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT RYAN FITZSIMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT GARY KAUG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT'S MEDICAL ISSUE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-01-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT OF HIS FAMILY MEDICAL ISSUE AND THAT HE NEEDED A 1 MONTH CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
